prompt: Create a realistic full-body street fashion photo of a young woman standing on a sunny urban sidewalk in a Japanese shopping district, wearing a 2.5D anime-inspired school-uniform outfit. She has long straight light brown hair with small dark hair ribbons, and her face is intentionally covered by a soft rectangular blur for anonymity. Outfit details: white sailor-style blouse with a navy collar and large navy bow, cream oversized ribbed cardigan, high-waisted navy-and-beige plaid pleated mini skirt, loose white scrunched leg warmers, chunky black platform loafers with gold buckle details, a small necklace, a green beaded bracelet, and a black shoulder bag with a chain strap held over one shoulder. Pose her standing casually with one hand holding the bag strap and the other relaxed by her skirt, legs slightly apart, photographed from a low-to-normal angle. Background: tree-lined city street with glass storefronts, office buildings, sidewalk tiles, planters, cars, pedestrians in the distance, and visible retail signs, all in bright midday sunlight with crisp shadows and natural depth of field. Use a polished fashion-editorial look, realistic skin and fabric textures, sharp full-body composition, vertical 2:3 framing, no extra text, no watermark.
